heading: Retired service members and dependents serving on advisory committees
label: 2944 Retired service members and dependents serving on advisory committees
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 117–2862018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 680 of this title
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 117–2862018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 680 of this title

children.text: advises or assists the Coast Guard with respect to a function that affects a member of the Coast Guard or a dependent of such a member; and
includes in its membership a retired Coast Guard member or a dependent of such a retired member;
